findings.description: Repeated page header/footer content in HTML
findings.evidence: The following text blocks repeat 3+ times, likely page headers/footers that should not appear in the body: 'history of hydrilla at lake tillery' (3x).

findings.description: The AWCP Website link in the HTML includes a fabricated Google Chrome text-fragment URL that does not appear anywhere in the PDF. The PDF shows only the display text 'Aquatic Weed Control Program | NC DEQ' without exposing the underlying href. The HTML injects a long URL ending with '#:~:text=Purpose%20The%20purpose%20of%20the%20Aquatic%20Weed%20Control,prevention%20and%20management%20of%20noxious%20aquatic%20weed%20infestations.' which is a Chrome-specific text-fragment selector not present in the source PDF.
findings.evidence: PDF page 11: 'AWCP Website (Aquatic Weed Control Program | NC DEQ)'. HTML: Aquatic Weed Control Program | NC DEQ
